zh.lifeSummary: William Kingston於1476年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾可利阿維爾。他和Mary Scrope至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。他在英國英格蘭米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦被列為constable of the tower of london。他去世於1540年9月14日在英國格盧斯特斯爾潘斯維其可享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾潘斯維其可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Kingston于1476年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾可利阿維爾。他和Mary Scrope至少有4个儿子和4个女儿。他在英国英格兰米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦被列为constable of the tower of london。他去世于1540年9月14日在英国格盧斯特斯爾潘斯維其可享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾潘斯維其可。

nameMeanings.name: Kingston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England called Kingston or Kingstone. Almost all of them derive from Old English cyning, cing ‘king’ (genitive cyninges, cinges) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have a different etymology, such as Kingston on Soar in Nottinghamshire, which derives from Old English cyne ‘royal’ + stān ‘stone’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William Kingston was born in 1476, in Clearwell, Gloucestershire, England. He had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Mary Scrope. His occupation is listed as constable of the tower of london in Tower of London, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. He died on 14 September 1540, in Painswick, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Painswick, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: William Kingston est né en 1476, à Clearwell, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Mary Scrope. Sa profession de son indiquée est constable of the tower of london à Tower of London, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 14 septembre 1540, à Painswick, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Painswick, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: William Kingston wurde 1476 in Clearwell, Gloucestershire, England geboren. Er hatte mit Mary Scrope mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als constable of the tower of london in Tower of London, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 14. September 1540 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Painswick, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Painswick, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: William Kingston è nato il nel 1476 nel Clearwell, Gloucestershire, England. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Mary Scrope. La sua occupazione è indicata come constable of the tower of london nel Tower of London, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 14 settembre 1540, nel Painswick, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Painswick, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Kingstonは1476年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアクレアルウエルで生まれた。彼はMary Scropeとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。イギリスイギリスミッドレセックストウエル オフ ロンドンでの職業はconstable of the tower of londonと記録されている。彼は1540年9月14日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアペインスウィックで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアペインスウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Kingston(은)는 1476년 영국 그루스스터실르 클리웰에서 태어났다. 그는 Mary Scrope(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 타워 프 런던에서 constable of the tower of london이었다. 그는 1540년 9월 14일 영국 그루스스터실르 파인스윅에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 파인스윅에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Kingston nasceu em 1476, em Clearwell, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Mary Scrope. Sua profissão aparece como constable of the tower of london em Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1540, em Painswick, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Painswick, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: William Kingston родился в 1476 г. в местности клирвелл, глоусестиршир, Англия. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Mary Scrope.  Он работал по профессии constable of the tower of london в местности тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 14 сентября 1540 г. в местности пеинсвикк, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности пеинсвикк, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: William Kingston nació en 1476, en Clearwell, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Mary Scrope. Su ocupación registrada era constable of the tower of london en Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1540, en Painswick, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Painswick, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
